# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.app.name }}
  namespace: {{ .Values.namespace }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.app.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.app.name }}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Values.container.name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.container.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.container.image.tag }}"
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: {{ .Values.container.port }}
        resources: {{ toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}
